use_cases: Displaying customer testimonials in a horizontally scrolling carousel format
Showcasing social proof and reviews on landing pages
Rotating through multiple testimonials with left/right navigation
Featuring user testimonials in product pages or marketing sections
Presenting quotes with author images and attribution in a carousel interface
ai_summary: A testimonials carousel component that displays customer quotes in a horizontally scrolling carousel with left/right navigation arrows. Built with Embla Carousel for smooth sliding functionality and Tailwind CSS for styling. Features quote icons, author images, and a clean minimalist design suitable for showcasing social proof on landing pages, product pages, or marketing sections across SaaS, e-commerce, and media platforms.
